info.name: X2Mail
info.summary: Webmail with native XOAUTH2/OAUTHBEARER SSO support
info.author: NK-IT Dev
info.description:
**X2Mail** — Webmail for Nextcloud with zero-login SSO. Log into Nextcloud via Keycloak or any OIDC provider, open Email — done. No extra passwords.
### How it works Your OIDC access token is passed directly to the IMAP server via OAUTHBEARER/XOAUTH2. Tokens refresh automatically in the background — no session drops.
### Features - **SSO via OAUTHBEARER/XOAUTH2** — Keycloak, Authentik, any OIDC provider - **Automatic token refresh** — seamless sessions via user_oidc TokenService - **Setup Wizard** — admin UI with preflight checks (IMAP, SMTP, OIDC) - **Dark mode** and responsive design - **Sieve filtering** support - **Nextcloud integration** — Contacts, Files, Calendar, Unified Search - **OpenPGP and S/MIME** encryption - **CLI tools** — `occ x2mail:setup`, `occ x2mail:status`
### Requirements - Nextcloud 33, PHP 8.4+ - IMAP server with OAUTHBEARER support (Dovecot recommended) - OIDC provider (Keycloak, Authentik, etc.) - `user_oidc` app (recommended) or `oidc_login`
Powered by SnappyMail engine (forked, security-audited, PHP 8.4 compatible).
